arts.ttl: Brighton blueprint that comes with £10m Hearts investment earns 'enthusiastic' response as David Weir factor hyped
arts.sum: Brighton owner and chairman Tony Bloom is in talks over an investment in the Jambos

arts.ttl: 'I don't like it': Referee Chris Kavanagh told Declan Rice he did NOT want to send him off against Brighton but Howard Webb explains why the Arsenal star was correctly shown red
arts.sum: Rice was issued with a yellow card in the first half for a late challenge on Joel Veltman, who was also involved in the incident that resulted in Rice receiving his second booking after half-time.

arts.ttl: Ref told Rice: 'I don't like the rule' as he sent him off vs Brighton
arts.sum: Referee Chris Kavanagh told Declan Rice he "doesn't like the rule" for booking players who delay restarts - as the official sent the Arsenal midfielder off for a second yellow in the Gunners' 1-1 draw with Brighton last month.

arts.ttl: Brighton facing dilemma after latest injury concern and another £25m signing ruled out ahead of Wolves
arts.sum: All the latest team news for Brighton and Hove Albion ahead of their Carabao Cup clash with Wolves

arts.ttl: Wolves transfer news: New contract, loan exit announced for two fringe players
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers announce that they have agreed a new contract with a fringe senior player and found a loan move for one of their prospects.

arts.ttl: Brighton vs Wolves confirmed injury news as 5 out and 3 doubts
arts.sum: All the latest team news for Brighton and Hove Albion ahead of their Carabao Cup clash vs Wolves

arts.ttl: Referee appointed for Aston Villa vs Wolves was told he made an 'incredible' mistake in his last game
arts.sum: The Premier League have appointed Tim Robinson as referee for Aston Villa vs Wolverhampton Wanderers this weekend.

arts.ttl: Hearts in talks with Brighton owner about £10m investment
arts.sum: Hearts are in talks with Brighton owner Tony Bloom over a potential £10m investment in the Scottish Premiership club.

arts.ttl: Fabian Hurzeler issues Joao Pedro and Mats Wieffer fitness updates ahead of Wolves
arts.sum: All the latest team news for Brighton and Hove Albion and across the Premier League

“It's never cool to lose football matches, but we feel better now than after the Chelsea game, where we were having a really good first half, and then everything fell apart second – that shouldn't be happening. Strand Larsen himself created Wolves’ goal for Mario Lemina – further evidence of him settling in – and now he wants the whole team to take the next step and match performances with points.
